user.title: Ajaxbridge
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to an ajaxbridge server.

abort.already_configured: This ajaxbridge installation is already configured.

connection.title: Ajaxbridge connection
connection.description: Update the ajaxbridge connection settings. The integration reloads after saving.

add_hub.title: Add hub
add_hub.description: Create a claim for this Home Assistant installation.

verify_hub.title: Verify hub
verify_hub.description: Add {code} to the Ajax user name on hub {hub_id}, perform a real Ajax action on that hub, then submit this step.

data_description.verification_code: Add this code to the Ajax user name on the hub, then perform arm/disarm or another real Ajax action before submitting.

complete_claim.title: Add to installation
complete_claim.description: Hub {hub_id} is verified. Submit this step to add it to this Home Assistant installation.

data.confirm_complete: Add this hub to this Home Assistant installation

memberships.title: Memberships
memberships.description: Enable or disable a hub membership for this Home Assistant installation.

error.expired: The verification code has expired. Start Add hub again to get a new code.
error.max_hubs_exceeded: This installation has reached its enabled hub limit. Disable another membership or ask an operator to increase Max hubs.
error.unauthorized: Ajaxbridge rejected this installation token or scope.
error.not_found: Ajaxbridge could not find this claim or membership for the current installation.
